x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: An empty KEDB means Now Assist cannot surface known error workarounds as AI resolution suggestions -- one of the highest-value AI deflection capabilities is completely inactive.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Use the OOB "Create Known Error" UI action on resolved problems to link a Knowledge Base article. This populates the kb_knowledge field (Primary Known Error article). Do not rely on the legacy known_error boolean field — it is deprecated in modern ServiceNow instances and not used by Now Assist.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[An empty KEDB means Now Assist cannot surface known error workarounds as AI resolution suggestions -- one of the highest-value AI deflection capabilities is completely inactive.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Known Error Database (KEDB) Usage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var totalGr = new GlideAggregate("problem");
    totalGr.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
    totalGr.addAggregate("COUNT");
    totalGr.query();
    var total = totalGr.next() ? parseInt(totalGr.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable",
            actualValue: "No closed/resolved problem records found (state IN 3,4)",
            finding: "No qualifying closed problem records. KEDB usage cannot be assessed." };
    }

    // KEDB dual-mechanism:
    // Mechanism 1: primary_known_error_article IS NOT EMPTY
    // (populated by "Create Known Error article" UI action on problem form)
    var keLinked = {};
    var keWithKEA = 0;
    try {
        var ke1 = new GlideRecord("problem");
        ke1.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
        ke1.addNotNullQuery("primary_known_error_article");
        ke1.query();
        while (ke1.next()) {
            keLinked[ke1.getUniqueValue()] = true;
            keWithKEA++;
        }
    } catch(e1) {}

    // Mechanism 2: m2m_kb_task (Attached Knowledge tab on problem)
    var keWithAttached = 0;
    try {
        var m2mGR = new GlideAggregate("m2m_kb_task");
        m2mGR.addAggregate("COUNT");
        m2mGR.groupBy("task");
        m2mGR.query();
        while (m2mGR.next()) {
            var taskId = m2mGR.getValue("task");
            if (!keLinked[taskId]) {
                // Verify it is a closed/resolved problem
                var pCheck = new GlideRecord("problem");
                pCheck.addQuery("sys_id", taskId);
                pCheck.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
                pCheck.setLimit(1);
                pCheck.query();
                if (pCheck.next()) {
                    keLinked[taskId] = true;
                    keWithAttached++;
                }
            }
        }
    } catch(e2) {}

    var knownErrors = Object.keys(keLinked).length;
    var pct = Math.round((knownErrors / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = knownErrors + " of " + total + " closed problems linked to knowledge (" + pct + "%) | " +
        keWithKEA + " via primary_known_error_article | " +
        keWithAttached + " via Attached Knowledge tab only (m2m_kb_task)";

    if (knownErrors >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: knownErrors + " problems are linked to knowledge. Now Assist can surface these as AI resolution suggestions on related incidents. Continue building the KEDB for high-frequency incident patterns." };
    } else if (knownErrors >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Only " + knownErrors + " problems linked to knowledge (target: 10+). Now Assist KEDB resolution suggestions have limited coverage. " +
            "Two mechanisms: (1) \"Create Known Error article\" UI action populates primary_known_error_article; (2) Attached Knowledge tab (m2m_kb_task)." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "KEDB not in active use. Now Assist cannot surface known error resolution suggestions -- a key incident deflection capability. " +
            "Link KB articles to closed problems via the \"Create Known Error article\" UI action or the Attached Knowledge tab." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000347</number><order>330</order><remediation_guidance>Use the OOB "Create Known Error" UI action on resolved problems to link a Knowledge Base article. This populates the kb_knowledge field (Primary Known Error article). Do not rely on the legacy known_error boolean field — it is deprecated in modern ServiceNow instances and not used by Now Assist.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Known Error Database (KEDB) Usage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
